name: Original Green Bean Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10 3/4 oz.) Campbell's Cream of Mushroom Soup, undiluted
2 packages (9 oz.) frozen green beans, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish, combine the soup, milk, and pepper; stir until well blended.
2. Stir in the green beans and 2/3 cup of onions.
3. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 30 minutes or until hot.
4. Stir.
5. Sprinkle with the remaining onions.
6. Bake an additional 5 minutes or until onions are golden brown.
7. Yield: 6 servings.
